complaints.message:
Confirm object synset assignment.
Object assigned to synset: coffee_table.n.01
Definition: low table where magazines can be placed and coffee or cocktails are served
Reminder: synset should match the object and not its contents.
(e.g. orange juice bottle needs to match orange_juice__bottle.n.01
and not orange_juice.n.01)
complaints.complaint: too tall to be a coffee table
